name: Product Watercolor
description: Ecommerce — preserve shape, clean background, gentle color.

prompt.positive: loose watercolor product illustration, soft color wash, clean white paper background, hand-painted, gentle painterly brushstrokes, minimal detail, ecommerce-friendly
prompt.negative: photo, photorealistic, busy background, traced fine detail, lineart, stippling, harsh edges, oversaturated, low quality, blurry
